summary: Iteration 178: Public Marketplace Routing Bug Fix - All tests passed. 12/12 backend tests passed (100%). 8/8 frontend tests passed (100%). The fix correctly splits the ordering flow: public marketplace uses /order-request form, while account marketplace retains cart/checkout behind auth.

issues: Price shows TZS 0 for some products (data issue, not routing bug)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: Created test marketplace_order requests for testing (REQ-260406-E1A92F, REQ-260406-E1D11C, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public marketplace routing fix verified. Key findings: (1) Public marketplace browse page (/marketplace) shows Order and Quote buttons for ALL users without login, (2) Order button links to /order-request NOT /account/*, (3) No /account/marketplace links exist on public marketplace, (4) Public product detail page shows 'Order Now' button NOT 'Add to Cart', (5) Clicking 'Order Now' navigates to /order-request with product context, (6) Public order request form renders with product summary, Your Details, Order Details sections, (7) POST /api/public-requests with request_type=marketplace_order succeeds, (8) Submitted marketplace_order requests appear in admin requests inbox, (9) Unauthenticated access to /account/marketplace and /account/orders redirects to /login, (10) Authenticated customer can access /account/marketplace with 'Add' and 'Detail' buttons, (11) Account product detail page has 'Add to Cart' button for authenticated users.

backend_tests.admin_requests_inbox_marketplace_order: PASS - marketplace_order requests appear in admin inbox
backend_tests.sales_visibility: PASS - Sales/admin can see marketplace_order requests
backend_tests.marketplace_products_search_public: PASS - Public can search marketplace products without auth
backend_tests.marketplace_listing_detail_public: PASS - Public can view product details without auth
backend_tests.invalid_request_type_rejected: PASS - Invalid request types are rejected
backend_tests.marketplace_order_valid_type: PASS - marketplace_order is a valid request type
backend_tests.authenticated_marketplace_access: PASS - Authenticated customer can access marketplace
backend_tests.authenticated_cart_access: PASS - Authenticated customer can access cart

frontend_tests.public_marketplace_loads: PASS - Public marketplace page loads with 17 products
frontend_tests.order_button_links_to_order_request: PASS - Order button href is /order-request NOT /account/*
frontend_tests.no_account_marketplace_links: PASS - No /account/marketplace links on public marketplace
frontend_tests.public_detail_order_now_button: PASS - Public detail page shows 'Order Now' button
frontend_tests.public_detail_no_add_to_cart: PASS - Public detail page does NOT show 'Add to Cart'
frontend_tests.order_request_form_submission: PASS - Order request form submits successfully
frontend_tests.unauthenticated_account_redirect: PASS - /account/* redirects to /login for unauthenticated users
frontend_tests.authenticated_account_marketplace: PASS - Authenticated customer sees 'Add' and 'Detail' buttons
